description: Composition Grey polo T-shirt made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This basic polo T-shirt from inesis promises eternal comfort while you are off-duty with its luxe, stretchable fabric that cuts a neat silhouette. Wear it with washed jeans and casual suede shoes. Model's Statistics: The product is a size M on a model of height 5'11" and shoulders 18"
